name: Face in the Crowd
description:
While in a crowd of roughly similar creatures, your appearance becomes bland and nondescript. You gain a +2 status bonus to Deception and Stealth checks to go incognito among the crowd, and you ignore difficult terrain caused by the crowd. This counts as setting up a disguise for the use of Deception and you add your level even if you're untrained.

Heightened (3rd) The spell gains a range of 10 feet and can target up to 10 creatures.
